title: Simple Pets
description: A lightweight plugin that allows players to own a personal, invulnerable pet companion that follows them everywhere and can be customized with a unique name.
body:
# Simple Pets

**SimplePets** is a plugin designed to give every player on your server a loyal companion for their adventures. It provides a simple, robust, and lag-free system for spawning, managing, and customizing a personal pet that is invulnerable, peaceful, and persistent across server restarts. This plugin is perfect for adding a fun cosmetic perk that boosts player engagement and gives a sense of companionship.

---

### Features
*   **Persistent Pets:** Player pets are saved and will be remembered even after a server restart.
*   **Invulnerable & Peaceful:** Pets cannot take any form of damage and will not attack other entities, making them purely cosmetic companions.
*   **Loyal Companion:** The pet will automatically teleport to its owner if they get too far away, ensuring it's never truly lost.
*   **Full Customization:** Players can spawn a variety of passive mobs and give them a unique, colorful name.
*   **Simple Management:** All features are managed through a single, intuitive command.
*   **Lightweight Design:** Built to be efficient, the plugin's follow-task is optimized to have a minimal impact on server performance.

---

### Commands
*   `/pet`: Displays the main help menu with all available sub-commands.
*   `/pet spawn <type>`: Spawns a new pet. If you already have one, it will be replaced.
    *   *Example:* `/pet spawn WOLF`, `/pet spawn CAT`, `/pet spawn PARROT`
*   `/pet name <name>`: Sets a custom name for your active pet. Supports color codes using `&`.
    *   *Example:* `/pet name &6&lBobby`
*   `/pet call`: Instantly teleports your pet to your current location.
*   `/pet remove`: Removes your current pet permanently.

---

### Permissions
*   `simplepets.use`: Grants access to the `/pet` command and all its sub-commands. (Given to all players by default).
